title: Add cutoff option chart
excerpt:
Could we add a cutoff option for charts? For example I only want to graph data if the count is above 6. 
If not we get super long and ugly graphs like this. 
  
Thanks

posts.author: lou.es (Lou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could we add a cutoff option for charts? For example I only want to graph data if the count is above 6.
If not we get super long and ugly graphs like this.

image1077×344 21.3 KB

Thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you add a filter to only include that value if it’s over 6?

posts.author: lou.es (Lou)
posts.cookedHtml: nope because it is just the count and not a column in my board!
